title: Mobile chat tab component with full-screen wrapper
purpose: Provides a full-screen chat interface for mobile devices that wraps the existing chat panel component and handles AI UI card rendering inline.
module_context: Exports a React functional component named ChatTab that accepts messages, send handler, and auto-switch callback props. The component renders a full-height flex container wrapping the ChatPanel component.

steps.content: Receive messages, send handler, and auto-switch callback as props.
Render a full-height flex container with white background.
Include the ChatPanel component inside the container.
Pass the auto-switch callback to the ChatPanel component.
